exercises.header: I wake up at seven in the morning.
What time do you wake up?
I get up from bed every morning.
exercises.answer: Σηκώνομαι από το κρεβάτι κάθε πρωί.

exercises.header: I don't want to get up today.
I wash every morning with cold water.
exercises.answer: Πλένομαι κάθε πρωί με κρύο νερό.

exercises.header: Wash your hands before you eat!
exercises.answer: Πλύνε τα χέρια σου πριν φας!

exercises.header: I get dressed quickly and leave.
I have breakfast every morning before work.
exercises.answer: Τρώω πρωινό κάθε πρωί πριν τη δουλειά.

exercises.header: I leave for work at eight.
exercises.answer: Φεύγω για τη δουλειά στις οκτώ.

exercises.header: I return home every evening at six.
exercises.answer: Επιστρέφω σπίτι κάθε βράδυ στις έξι.
